title: An Act Regarding Municipal Authority over Heavy Vehicle Operation
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 17, 2025
last_house_action: 3/21/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
last_senate_action: 4/17/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on March 12, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
